member.name: M:AgentConfigFormatHelper.AutoDetectAndParse(System.String)
member.summary: Auto-detects the agent config format (json or .Hazina) and parses agent definitions. If JSON is detected, parses using System.Text.Json. Otherwise, attempts .Hazina parse logic.

member.name: M:AgentConfigFormatHelper.IsLikelyJson(System.String)
member.summary: Heuristic for whether the config is likely JSON. Accepts whitespace then expects [, { or ".

member.name: M:FlowConfigFormatHelper.AutoDetectAndParse(System.String)
member.summary: Auto-detects the agent config format (json or .Hazina) and parses agent definitions. If JSON is detected, parses using System.Text.Json. Otherwise, attempts .Hazina parse logic.

member.name: M:FlowConfigFormatHelper.IsLikelyJson(System.String)
member.summary: Heuristic for whether the config is likely JSON. Accepts whitespace then expects [, { or ".

member.name: M:StoreConfigFormatHelper.AutoDetectAndParse(System.String)
member.summary: Auto-detects the store config format (json or .Hazina) and parses store definitions. If JSON is detected, parses using System.Text.Json. Otherwise, attempts .Hazina parse logic.

member.name: M:StoreConfigFormatHelper.IsLikelyJson(System.String)
member.summary: Heuristic for whether the config is likely JSON. Accepts whitespace then expects [, { or ".

member.name: T:HazinaAgentConfigParser
member.summary: Parser and serializer for AgentConfig in .hazina plain text format.

member.name: M:HazinaAgentConfigParser.Serialize(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{AgentConfig})
member.summary: Serialize a list of AgentConfig into .hazina format.

member.name: M:HazinaAgentConfigParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a .Hazina agent config string into a list of AgentConfig objects.

member.name: T:HazinaFlowConfigParser
member.summary: Parser and serializer for AgentConfig in .Hazina plain text format.

member.name: M:HazinaFlowConfigParser.Serialize(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FlowConfig})
member.summary: Serialize a list of AgentConfig into .Hazina format.

member.name: M:HazinaFlowConfigParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a .Hazina agent config string into a list of AgentConfig objects.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.AgentFactory
member.summary:
Factory for creating and managing Hazina agents and flows. Refactored from 1,088 lines to follow Single Responsibility Principle.
Responsibilities (now focused): - Agent creation and registration - Flow creation and registration - Configuration management
Delegated to services: - Email operations → EmailService - BigQuery operations → BigQueryService - Tool registration → ToolRegistrationService - Agent/Flow execution → AgentExecutionService

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.AgentFactoryExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for AgentFactory to support Semantic Kernel
Create an agent using Semantic Kernel client
Create an unregistered agent using Semantic Kernel client
Create an agent with a custom ILLMClient implementation
Create an unregistered agent with a custom ILLMClient implementation

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.AgentManager
member.summary: AgentManager encapsulates all logic for agent and store initialization, configuration, and provides interfaces for agent interaction. It loads configuration from paths provided in the constructor and is the single point of ownership for Hazina agents and stores, so the rest of the application can treat it entirely as a black box for agent management.

member.name: P:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.AgentManager.Stores
member.summary: All available stores, as loaded and constructed from stores.json

member.name: P:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.AgentManager.Agents
member.summary: All available agents, as loaded and constructed from agents.json

member.name: M:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.AgentManager.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Instantiates the AgentManager, loads configuration, and initializes all stores and agents.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.AgentManager.LoadStoresAndAgents
member.summary: Loads and initializes all document stores and agents from provided configuration files.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.AgentManager.InteractiveUserLoop(System.String)
member.summary: Interactively communicates with a specified agent through the console, using the agent's context and configuration.
Centralized agent creation method.

member.name: M:Hazina.AgentFactory.Core.QuickAgentCreator.CreateStore(StorePaths,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a document store for code and agent memory.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.BigQuery.BigQueryService
member.summary: Service for BigQuery operations. Extracted from AgentFactory to follow Single Responsibility Principle.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.BigQuery.IBigQueryService
member.summary: Interface for BigQuery operations.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Email.EmailDetail
member.summary: Detailed information about an email message including body content.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Email.EmailService
member.summary: Service for email operations including sending, reading, and organizing emails. Extracted from AgentFactory to follow Single Responsibility Principle.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Email.EmailSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for email operations via SMTP and IMAP.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Email.EmailSummary
member.summary: Summary information about an email message.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Email.IEmailService
member.summary: Interface for email operations.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Execution.AgentExecutionService
member.summary: Service responsible for agent and flow execution. Extracted from AgentFactory to follow Single Responsibility Principle.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Execution.IAgentExecutionService
member.summary: Interface for agent and flow execution operations.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Tools.IToolRegistrationService
member.summary: Interface for tool registration operations.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Tools.Parameters.CommonToolParameters
member.summary: Common reusable tool parameters used across different tools. Extracted from AgentFactory to centralize parameter definitions.

member.name: T:Hazina.AgentFactory.Services.Tools.ToolRegistrationService
member.summary: Service responsible for registering tools with agent contexts. Extracted from AgentFactory to follow Single Responsibility Principle.

member.name: T:AgentCardModel
member.summary: Agent binding card model for WPF UI.

member.name: T:FlowCardModel
member.summary: Model voor het binden van FlowConfig aan WPF UI met ObservableCollection en INotifyPropertyChanged.

member.name: M:FlowCardModel.ToFlowConfig
member.summary: Zet deze FlowCardModel terug om naar FlowConfig

member.name: T:FlowCardsBindingModel
member.summary: Root bindingmodel voor meerdere flowkaart-modellen plus keuzedata

member.name: T:StoreEntry
member.summary: Represents a store entry for agents; supports WPF data binding.
